The '''Heavy TIE Bomber''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for heavy assault and mobile artillery missions. The Heavy TIE Bomber could be used in space and atmospheric conditions. The spacecraft was an enhancement to the standard [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]], having dual weapons pods in the place of the original single payload module. In a ground assault vehicle role, the Heavy Bomber was very effective at destroying mechanized and heavy weapons units such as [[T3-B heavy attack tank]] and [[Artillery (Rebel Alliance)|artillery]]. In addition the Heavy TIE Bomber was most effective at destroying enemy [[Power core/Legends|power cores]].

==Appearances==
